name: Xin Zhao

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Determination
passive.description_source: Innate:  Xin Zhao's  basic attacks  on-hit and  Wind Becomes Lightning strikes generate a stack of Determination, stacking up to 3 times.

effects.description: Innate: Xin Zhao's basic attacks on-hit and Wind Becomes Lightning's first slash hit and thrust on at least one enemy hit each generate a stack of Determination, stacking up to 3 times. The third stack consumes them all to deal 15% / 30% / 45% / 60% (based on level) AD bonus physical damage and heal Xin Zhao for 3% / 4% / 5% (based on level) of his maximum health (+ 65% AP).

Innate - Challenge: Wind Becomes Lightning and, if Crescent Guard has been learned, Xin Zhao's basic attacks and Audacious Charge, apply a Challenged mark to certain enemies hit for 3 seconds. Only one enemy can be marked as Challenged at a time; applying the mark to a new target removes it from the previous one. Audacious Charge and Crescent Guard have interactions against Challenged targets.

passive.description: Innate: Xin Zhao's basic attacks on-hit and Wind Becomes Lightning's first slash hit and thrust on at least one enemy hit each generate a stack of Determination, stacking up to 3 times. The third stack consumes them all to deal 15% / 30% / 45% / 60% (based on level) AD bonus physical damage and heal Xin Zhao for 3% / 4% / 5% (based on level) of his maximum health (+ 65% AP).
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Determination Details The healing and bonus damage work on different stacking systems, each counting its stacks and being consumed separately.

basic_ability_1.name: Three Talon Strike
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Xin Zhao empowers his next few  attacks within a duration to deal bonus physical damage and  reduce his other  ability cooldowns.

effects.context_notes: Active: Xin Zhao empowers his next three basic attacks on-attack within 5 seconds to each have an uncancellable windup, deal bonus physical damage and reduce his other abilities' current cooldowns by 1 second.

Active: Xin Zhao empowers his next three basic attacks on-attack within 5 seconds to each have an uncancellable windup, deal bonus physical damage and reduce his other abilities' current cooldowns by 1 second.

effects.description: The third attack knocks up the target for 0.75 seconds.
Three Talon Strike's bonus damage is affected by critical strike modifiers.
Three Talon Strike resets Xin Zhao's basic attack timer.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Xin Zhao empowers his next three basic attacks on-attack within 5 seconds to each have an uncancellable windup, deal bonus physical damage and reduce his other abilities' current cooldowns by 1 second. Each attack refreshes the duration.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Three Talon Strike is a timed three-attack empower sequence with attack-cadence-coupled hit timing, including empowered-hit windups and a basic-attack-timer reset at cast.

Source notes (summary): Third-hit crowd-control branch is distinct from damage branches (spell-shield blocks knock-up branch only), while each empowered hit also advances other-ability cooldown reduction.

basic_ability_2.name: Wind Becomes Lightning
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Xin Zhao slashes in an arc, then thrusts his spear in a line in the target direction. Each strike deals physical damage to enemies hit and heals Xin Zhao based on his  life steal.

effects.context_notes: Active: Xin Zhao unleashes 4 slashes in an arc over the first 0.
Active: Xin Zhao unleashes 4 slashes in an arc over the first 0.
Active: Xin Zhao unleashes 4 slashes in an arc over the first 0.
Active: Xin Zhao unleashes 4 slashes in an arc over the first 0.

effects.description: Wind Becomes Lightning's damage heals Xin Zhao for 33.3% of his life steal.

The durations of Three Talon Strike and Audacious Charge's bonus attack speed are delayed relative to Wind Becomes Lightning's cast time. Xin Zhao reveals himself during the cast if there is an enemy champion nearby.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Xin Zhao unleashes 4 slashes in an arc over the first 0.15 seconds of the cast time, each dealing physical damage to enemies within. After the remaining cast time, he then thrusts his spear in a line in the target direction, dealing physical damage to enemies hit, increased by 0% : 33.3% (based on critical strike chance), and slowing them by 50% for 1.5 seconds. Wind Becomes Lightning deals 50% : 100% (based on level) damage to minions.The farthest champion or large monster hit within the thrust's area is also marked as Challenged and is revealed for 3 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): PENDING FOR TEST: The self-reveal has not been fully tested for complete confirmation.

basic_ability_3.name: Audacious Charge
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Xin Zhao  dashes to the target enemy, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies and briefly  slowing them. He then gains  bonus attack speed for a few seconds.

effects.context_notes: Active: Xin Zhao dashes to the target enemy's location, dealing magic damage to them and nearby enemies and slowing all targets hit by 30% for 0.
Xin Zhao then gains bonus attack speed for 5 seconds.

effects.description: Three Talon Strike and Crescent Guard can be cast during the dash.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Xin Zhao dashes to the target enemy's location, dealing magic damage to them and nearby enemies and slowing all targets hit by 30% for 0.5 seconds. Audacious Charge's range is increased against Challenged targets.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The primary target cannot dodge Audacious Charge's effects.

ultimate.name: Crescent Guard
ultimate.description_source: Passive - Challenge: The last enemy champion hit by  Xin Zhao's  basic attacks or  Audacious Charge is marked Challenged for a short time.

effects.description: Passive: Xin Zhao's basic attacks and Audacious Charge apply the Challenged mark to enemy champions hit, with the latter applying the mark to the farthest champion hit in the area of effect or the primary target if they are a champion.

effects.context_notes: Active: Xin Zhao sweeps his spear around him, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies, capped at 600 against minions and monsters, and knocking back all targets hit that are not Challenged up-to 700 units over 0.

effects.description: For the next 4 seconds, Xin Zhao is invulnerable against enemy champions far away from him.

ultimate.description: Passive: Xin Zhao's basic attacks and Audacious Charge apply the Challenged mark to enemy champions hit, with the latter applying the mark to the farthest champion hit in the area of effect or the primary target if they are a champion.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
